metadata.name: netsuite2__balance_sheet
metadata.comment: The balance sheet query uses the transactions_with_converted_amount transformation to recreate all lines necessary for the balance sheet. Transactions that are not balance sheet transactions are categorized as either Retained Earnings or Net Income.  The Cumulative Translation Adjustment total, which in most cases does not have transactions associated with it, is calculated manually in the second part of the query.

to_subsidiary_currency_symbol.comment: Currency symbol for the consolidated exchange rate.

accounting_period_ending.comment: End date of the accounting period

is_accounting_period_closed.comment: Boolean field, indicating whether or not the selecting accounting period is closed.

metadata.comment: This model provides a unified view of entity-subsidiary relationships for both customers and vendors. metadata.name: netsuite2__transaction_details
metadata.comment: This table uses Netsuite's core table, transaction_lines, and joins a handful of  other tables to add more detail to those line items.  For all transactions, you are  able to see the associated accounting period, account and subsidiary.  Where applicable,  you can also see information about the customer, location, item, vendor, and department.

transaction_memo.comment: Memo associated with the transaction line.

is_transaction_non_posting.comment: Boolean field, indicating whether or not the transaction line is non-posting.

is_main_line.name: is_main_line
is_main_line.comment: Boolean indicating if the transaction line is a main line entry.

is_tax_line.name: is_tax_line
is_tax_line.comment: Boolean indicating if the transaction line is a tax line..

is_closed.name: is_closed
is_closed.comment: Boolean indicating if the accounting period is closed.

transaction_status.name: transaction_status
transaction_status.comment: Status of the transaction (Closed, Pending Billing, Billing, etc.).

transaction_date.name: transaction_date
transaction_date.comment: Timestamp of the date which the transaction occurred.

transaction_due_date.name: transaction_due_date
transaction_due_date.comment: Timestamp of the date which the transaction is due.

nexus_country.name: nexus_country
nexus_country.comment: The country associated with the nexus.

nexus_state.name: nexus_state
nexus_state.comment: The state associated with the nexus.

tax_agency_id.name: tax_agency_id
tax_agency_id.comment: The unique identifier of the tax agency.

tax_agency_alt_name.name: tax_agency_alt_name
tax_agency_alt_name.comment: Alternative name of the tax agency.

is_nexus_override.name: is_nexus_override
is_nexus_override.comment: Boolean indicating if the nexus has been overridden.

is_tax_details_override.name: is_tax_details_override
is_tax_details_override.comment: Boolean indicating if the tax details have been overridden.

tax_point_date.name: tax_point_date
tax_point_date.comment: The date at which the tax point is determined.

is_tax_point_date_override.name: is_tax_point_date_override
is_tax_point_date_override.comment: Boolean indicating if the tax point date has been overridden.

transaction_line_fivetran_synced_date.comment: _fivetran_synced of the transaction_line formatted as a date for incremental logic use.

transaction_number.name: transaction_number
transaction_number.comment: The Netsuite generated number of the transaction.

entity_id.name: entity_id
entity_id.comment: The entity id of the entity used for the record.

is_transaction_intercompany_adjustment.name: is_transaction_intercompany_adjustment
is_transaction_intercompany_adjustment.comment: Boolean field, indicating whether or not the transaction is an intercompany transaction or an advanced intercompany transaction.

is_reversal.name: is_reversal
is_reversal.comment: Boolean indicating if line is reversal.

reversal_transaction_id.name: reversal_transaction_id
reversal_transaction_id.comment: Transaction id of the counterparty in a reversing pair.

reversal_date.name: reversal_date
reversal_date.comment: Transaction date of the counterparty in a reversing pair.

accounting_period_ending.name: accounting_period_ending
accounting_period_ending.comment: End date of the accounting period.

accounting_period_full_name.name: accounting_period_full_name
accounting_period_full_name.comment: The full name or display name of the accounting period within the fiscal calendar, providing descriptive period names like 'FY2023 : Q1 2023'.

accounting_period_id.name: accounting_period_id
accounting_period_id.comment: The unique identifier of the accounting period.

is_accounting_period_adjustment.name: is_accounting_period_adjustment
is_accounting_period_adjustment.comment: Boolean field, indicating whether or not the selecting accounting period is an adjustment period.

is_accounting_period_closed.name: is_accounting_period_closed
is_accounting_period_closed.comment: Boolean field, indicating whether or not the selecting accounting period is closed.

account_display_name.name: account_display_name
account_display_name.comment: Account name without number or hierarchy.

account_type_id.name: account_type_id
account_type_id.comment: The unique identifier of the account type.

account_number.name: account_number
account_number.comment: Account number associated with the account.

is_account_leftside.name: is_account_leftside
is_account_leftside.comment: Boolean field indicating whether or not the account is leftside.

is_accounts_payable.name: is_accounts_payable
is_accounts_payable.comment: Boolean field indicating whether or not the account type name includes 'accounts payable'.

is_accounts_receivable.name: is_accounts_receivable
is_accounts_receivable.comment: Boolean field indicating whether or not the account type name includes 'accounts receivable'.

is_account_intercompany.name: is_account_intercompany
is_account_intercompany.comment: Boolean field indicating whether or not the account type name includes 'intercompany'.

is_eliminate.name: is_eliminate
is_eliminate.comment: Boolean indicating if line will auto-eliminate.

parent_account_id.name: parent_account_id
parent_account_id.comment: Unique identifier of the parent account, if parent account relationship exists.  Otherwise, the identifier of the account.

parent_account_name.name: parent_account_name
parent_account_name.comment: Name of the parent account, if parent account relationship exists.  Otherwise, the name of the account.

is_expense_account.name: is_expense_account
is_expense_account.comment: Boolean field indicating whether or not the account is an expense account.

is_income_account.name: is_income_account
is_income_account.comment: Boolean field indicating whether or not the account is an income account.

customer_alt_name.name: customer_alt_name
customer_alt_name.comment: Name of the person or company.

customer_city.name: customer_city
customer_city.comment: City where the customer is located.

customer_state.name: customer_state
customer_state.comment: State where the customer is located.

customer_country.name: customer_country
customer_country.comment: Country where the customer is located.

customer_external_id.name: customer_external_id
customer_external_id.comment: The unique identifier of the external customer reference.

class_id.name: class_id
class_id.comment: The unique identifier of the class used for the record.

item_id.name: item_id
item_id.comment: The unique identifier of the item used within the record.

sales_description.name: sales_description
sales_description.comment: Description of the item for sales purposes.

location_id.name: location_id
location_id.comment: The unique identifier of the location used for the record.

location_city.name: location_city
location_city.comment: City used as a location reference.

location_country.name: location_country
location_country.comment: Country used as a location reference.

vendor_category_id.name: vendor_category_id
vendor_category_id.comment: Unique identifier of the vendor category.

vendor_id.name: vendor_id
vendor_id.comment: The unique identifier of the vendor.

currency_id.name: currency_id
currency_id.comment: The currency id of the currency used within the record.

currency_symbol.name: currency_symbol
currency_symbol.comment: Symbol used to identify the currency type.

department_id.name: department_id
department_id.comment: The unique identifier of the department used for the record.

exchange_rate.name: exchange_rate
exchange_rate.comment: Exchange rate used on the transaction.

department_full_name.name: department_full_name
department_full_name.comment: Full hierarchical name of the department.

subsidiary_id.name: subsidiary_id
subsidiary_id.comment: The unique identifier of the subsidiary.

subsidiary_full_name.name: subsidiary_full_name
subsidiary_full_name.comment: Full hierarchical name of the subsidiary.

converted_amount.name: converted_amount
converted_amount.comment: Transaction amount, converted into the primary subsidiary's default currency. The sign is flipped for income and other income accounts to follow accounting conventions. All other accounts retain their original sign.

transaction_amount.name: transaction_amount
transaction_amount.comment: Total amount of the transaction line. The sign is flipped for income and other income accounts to follow accounting conventions. All other accounts retain their original sign.

transaction_line_amount.name: transaction_line_amount
transaction_line_amount.comment: Net amount of the transaction line. This is the actual amount entered when it's in a currency other than the functional currency of the subsidiary. The sign is flipped for income and other income accounts to follow accounting conventions. All other accounts retain their original sign.

converted_amount_raw.name: converted_amount_raw
converted_amount_raw.comment: Original converted transaction amount, without sign adjustments. Represents the amount exactly as recorded in the source system.

transaction_amount_raw.name: transaction_amount_raw
transaction_amount_raw.comment: Original transaction line amount, without sign adjustments. Reflects the raw amount entered in the source system.

transaction_line_amount_raw.name: transaction_line_amount_raw
transaction_line_amount_raw.comment: Original net amount of the transaction line, without sign adjustments. Matches the amount entered in the transaction currency.

transaction_details_id.name: transaction_details_id
transaction_details_id.comment: Surrogate key hashed on `source_relation`, `transaction_line_id` and `transaction_id`. Adds `to_subsidiary_id` if using subsidiaries and `accounting_book_id` if using multibook accounting.
